current.summary: Uranus in Gemini arrives at exact inconjunct to natal Jupiter in the Scorpio 5th today, June 14-15. The adjustment that's been building since March — between how the creative work runs at depth and how it presents outward — lands now.
current.reading:
Natal Jupiter sits at 2°52' Scorpio in the 5th house: the creative engine, the business, the place where full imaginative and psychological weight produce the work that actually grows. Jupiter in Scorpio in the 5th means the work operates at depth or not at all. Partial engagement with the 5th house creative field generates proportionally partial results. The well goes all the way down, or it isn't the well.

Uranus entered Gemini as of 2025, beginning a 7-year transit through the sign of language, connection, multiplicity, and quick pivots in framing. Uranus doesn't move gradually toward something. It arrives. At 2.83° Gemini, it is in exact inconjunct to natal Jupiter at 2.87° Scorpio.

The inconjunct (150°) is the aspect of adjustment. Not a challenge (that would be the square), not support (that would be the trine). The inconjunct is the persistent signal that something in the current structure needs to calibrate. Gemini is mutable air: quick, adaptive, communicative, multi-directional. Scorpio is fixed water: total, depth-seeking, non-compromising. These two modes are genuinely incompatible. The inconjunct says: find a way to incorporate the signal from the incompatible side.

What Uranus in Gemini is pressing on natal Jupiter in Scorpio 5th: the creative work needs a pivot in form or framing that is not being driven by the depth work itself. The depth is not the problem; Jupiter in Scorpio will maintain depth regardless. The adjustment is in the Gemini register: communication, presentation, how the thing is framed and offered, what the language of the entry point is. A sudden pivot in how the work is described, named, or delivered. A structural shift in the way the product reaches people.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini is simultaneously opposing natal North Node and conjuncting natal South Node — both ends of the soul axis activated at once. Exact June 17-18. The soul direction is not being blocked; it's being rewired at the root.
current.reading:
Your natal North Node is at approximately 3°02' Sagittarius in the 6th house. Your natal South Node is at 3°02' Gemini in the 12th house. The nodal axis is the soul's trajectory: the South Node is the accumulated pattern, what comes instinctively, what you return to under pressure, what the soul can do without thinking. The North Node is the growth direction, less instinctive, requiring intentional choice.

Your South Node in Gemini in the 12th describes a soul pattern of multiplicity and mirroring operating at the unconscious level: adaptability, linguistic intelligence, the ability to read rooms and reflect them back, the habit of dissolving into what's expected rather than holding a fixed position. The shadow of this South Node is using that adaptability to avoid the full-weight commitment the North Node in Sagittarius requires.

Uranus at 2.83° Gemini is now opposing the NNode and conjuncting the SNode simultaneously. This is a nodal axis transit: it activates both ends of the soul trajectory at once. Uranus conjunct SNode disrupts the comfort of the old pattern — the Gemini adaptation groove gets a Uranian jolt. Whatever version of the South Node pattern is still operating gets interrupted. Suddenly. Sometimes uncomfortably. The disruption isn't punishment. The old groove is becoming less comfortable than the new direction.

current.summary: Pluto retrograde in Aquarius is applying toward exact sextile to natal Moon in the Aries 10th house, arriving around June 28-July 1. The depth is becoming authority — not performed authority, but the kind that comes from having gone all the way in and returned with accurate information.
current.reading:
Your Moon at 4°58' Aries is in the 10th house. Career and emotional life run on the same circuit. There's no insulation between them. Career recognition lands in the body. Professional slights hit the nervous system directly. When work is in motion, you feel well. When the professional environment gets uncertain or unfair, it doesn't stay at the job level.

Pluto in Aquarius is the long arc of systemic pressure, the decade-long renovation of collective structures and what authority actually means. At 5° Aquarius, it's in its earliest Aquarian chapter: the cold clear light of a system being rebuilt from the root.

The sextile is a cooperative aspect. Pluto is making an offer to the Moon, not forcing a reckoning on it. The offer: the emotional intelligence you carry, what you can feel in rooms and conversations before anyone speaks, the knowing that runs through your 10th house career-Moon, can become structural authority. Not softness that earns a seat at the table eventually. Authority that is simply the accurate read, named directly. What this transit does specifically: it begins to close the gap between what you know internally and what you claim publicly.

current.summary: Chiron sextile the 29° Gemini Ascendant peaked June 7 — both at anaretic degrees simultaneously. The wound is past exact but still in close range. Its retrograde second pass comes around August 2026.
current.reading:
Your Ascendant sits at 29°22' Gemini, the anaretic degree. Not just Gemini rising but Gemini at full compression, carrying everything the sign has been building toward before it hands over to Cancer. The threshold degree means something is always nearly completed, nearly transmittable, in how you meet the world.

Transiting Chiron at 29°21' Aries reached exact sextile to this Ascendant around June 7, 2026. Both planets simultaneously anaretic, both at threshold, in a cooperative aspect. That doesn't happen often. The wound completing its Aries chapter — the courage that shows up damaged, the warrior who can't stop feeling it — is making an opening toward the degree where self-presentation has always been the work.

The sextile doesn't force anything. It creates a door that can be walked through. What Chiron is offering to the Ascendant from Aries is the thing the wound learned: showing up as exactly who you are, including in the places where that's generated the most friction, is the only move that actually works at the threshold. The Gemini rising tendency to adapt, to read the room and mirror it back, to be legible to everyone you meet — Chiron from Aries is telling that pattern it doesn't have to earn belonging through translation. The wound has done enough reconnaissance.

current.summary: Neptune sesquiquadrate natal Venus in the Scorpio 5th peaked around May 15 and is now separating. The friction pressed a persistent question about what is genuinely desired versus what the imagination has idealized into place.
current.reading:
Natal Venus at 25°22' Scorpio in the 5th house is not a planet in a light-touch placement. Venus in Scorpio in the 5th operates through intensity: aesthetic precision, the refusal of surface-level connection in love or creative work, the all-or-nothing investment in what genuinely matters. The 5th house is creative expression, deep play, the work that carries your full imaginative weight; in Scorpio, that house requires total engagement or it doesn't engage at all.

The risk native to this placement is the shadow side of that same depth. Scorpio Venus is strong enough to construct a complete and compelling inner world around something the outer world doesn't actually support. The imagination can sustain that construction for a long time. The feeling is real; the ground may not be.

Neptune in Aries at approximately 4° forms a sesquiquadrate (135°) to natal Venus at ~19° Scorpio. The sesquiquadrate is not the confrontational tension of a square or the clear support of a trine. It's a persistent background friction, a recalibration signal that doesn't announce itself as a crisis. Applied to Venus in Scorpio 5th: Neptune pressed a soft but persistent question about what is genuinely desired versus what the imagination has idealized into place. Not a breakdown. A slowly building clarity.

current.summary: The North Node trine natal Jupiter peaked June 11 and is now separating. The soul direction and the creative engine were confirmed to be running the same current. That confirmation still echoes — the path through the depth work is the correct one.
current.reading:
The transiting North Node in Pisces makes a trine to natal Jupiter at 2°52' Scorpio in the 5th house. Both water signs. A 120° angle, the geometry of ease and natural current. Water to water, depth to depth.

Natal Jupiter in Scorpio in the 5th is not a gentle placement. Jupiter is the planet of expansion and meaning, and in Scorpio it expands only through total engagement. No partial investment, no surface-level commitment. The 5th house is the domain of creativity, play, self-expression, and the work that carries your full imaginative weight. Jupiter here means the work that goes all the way in is the work that actually grows. This is the chart's creative engine, and it runs on depth or doesn't run.

The trine between the Pisces North Node and this Scorpio Jupiter is confirmation, not construction. It isn't manufacturing new direction; it's saying the direction already chosen, already underway, is the correct one. The soul path and the creative engine are aligned. The path runs through the work. The resistance encountered is not evidence of wrong direction. The path is right.

current.summary: The transiting North Node in Pisces is approaching exact square to natal Sun in the Sagittarius 6th, arriving June 15-17. A sharp question about how the daily work identity and the Piscean evolutionary direction can coexist — brief, compressed, significant.
current.reading:
Your natal Sun sits at approximately 1°82' Sagittarius in the 6th house. The Sun is the organizing principle of the self, the light through which everything else in the chart operates. In Sagittarius in the 6th, that organizing principle is expressed through meaning-seeking enacted in daily work: the craft that carries philosophical weight, the practice that is simultaneously operational and purposeful. Sagittarius needs a reason that matters to function. The 6th house delivers that need into the daily schedule. The Sun here works best when the work is the meaning, not just a container for it.

The natal Sun also conjuncts the natal NNode at 1.2°. The core identity and the soul direction are oriented in the same direction. Where the Sun illuminates, the NNode is already pointing.

Transiting North Node at approximately 2°40' Pisces is moving retrograde at approximately 0.047°/day. At this degree it forms a square to natal Sun at 1°82' Sagittarius, with exact contact arriving approximately June 15-17. The square asks: is the way you're currently living the Sagittarian Sun actually moving you toward it, or has the approach drifted? The transiting Piscean direction (surrender, trust in the invisible layer, dissolution of the need to construct meaning before receiving it) is in 90° friction with the natal Sagittarian Sun's organizing principle. The friction is sharp and brief — the Node moves fast. It compresses what it needs to say.

current.summary: The transiting NNode in Pisces has moved past exact square to natal NNode — a 90° milestone in the 18.6-year nodal cycle, the quarter-point that arrives at age 32. Past exact now but still in range.
current.reading:
Your natal North Node sits at 3°02' Sagittarius in the 6th house. That placement names the soul's growth direction: meaning-seeking, teaching, philosophical depth, the embodied philosophical, the daily work as the arena where the soul actually develops. In the 6th house, this growth happens not through grand gestures but through consistent practice. The Node here grows through showing up to the work, through the craft itself.

The transiting North Node at 2°40' Pisces has just passed exact square to natal NNode. At the 90° angle to natal NNode at 3° Sagittarius, it forms what's called the nodal square — the quarter-point in the Node's 18.6-year cycle. This happens at predictable ages: approximately 4, 13, 22, 32, 41, 50. Each instance is a recalibration point for the soul direction.

What the nodal square does: it doesn't invalidate the natal soul direction. Sagittarius NNode in the 6th house hasn't changed. What it does is put the current mode of pursuing that direction under pressure from a perpendicular angle. The question the square asks: is the way you're currently living the Sagittarian NNode actually moving you toward it, or has the path drifted? Pisces as the transiting Node's current sign adds specificity — the Piscean evolutionary pull toward surrender and trust in the invisible layer presses on the Sagittarian building-and-synthesizing instinct.

current.summary: Neptune is approaching exact conjunction to natal Moon in the Aries 10th house — first exact in late June/early July 2026. The career-emotional circuit is running with no insulation between them. The reads are accurate, and the costs are real.
current.reading:
Your Moon at 4°58' Aries is in the 10th house. That placement means the emotional body and the professional life are not separate organs. Career recognition lands personally. When work goes well, you feel well. When the professional environment gets uncertain or unfair, it doesn't stay at the job level. It goes directly into the body.

Neptune is dissolving the usual filtering layer between what you sense and what you feel. On a practical level: the room you walk into, you already know its mood before anyone speaks. The colleague who's struggling, you register before they say anything. The project that's actually fine, you feel the fine before the data confirms it. Neptune on the Moon is a permeability upgrade that comes with a cost: the usual distance between intake and overwhelm gets shorter.

Because this is the 10th house Moon, Neptune isn't doing something purely interior. It's thinning the wall between your emotional experience and your professional visibility. The career becomes more personally felt. Creative vision flows more easily into the work. Protection is also thinner. A slight, a moment of being uncredited, a project that doesn't land — these land harder than they would otherwise. That's not fragility. It's the transit.

current.summary: Saturn in Aries past exact inconjunct to natal Mercury in the Scorpio 5th. The pressure was to cut the preamble — state the actual thing first, without the Scorpio spiral of preparation and context. Still in range; retrograde pass possible September.
current.reading:
Natal Mercury sits at 16°01' Scorpio in the 5th house. Mercury in Scorpio in the 5th is not a neutral communications planet. In Scorpio, in the house of creative weight and full engagement, Mercury thinks by going underneath the surface of things. It investigates, suspects, holds a thought until it has reached its full depth before surfacing. The mind is thorough, psychologically precise, and slow to state the unfinished version. The risk: when the depth is real and the thought is ready, Mercury in Scorpio still tends to approach it obliquely, surrounding it with context and preparation before the central point arrives. The depth becomes a spiral. The spiral becomes preamble.

Transiting Saturn in Aries forms an inconjunct (150°) to natal Mercury at 12°17' Scorpio. Aries and Scorpio share nothing in element, modality, or polarity. Aries is cardinal fire: direct, initiating, present. Scorpio is fixed water: depth-first, comprehensive, non-compromising. The inconjunct says: find a way to incorporate the signal from the incompatible side.

Saturn inconjunct Mercury presses the mind's operating mode toward calibration. The Scorpio Mercury's habit of extensive preparation before stating the central thing is being called on to cut shorter. Not to cut the depth: to cut the approach to the depth. Saturn in Aries wants the direct version. The actual thing, stated first. The precision is already there. The directness is the calibration being asked.

current.summary: Uranus opposition natal Sun in the Sagittarius 6th — first exact was May 14, now 1.01° separating. The container the Sun has been presented in is being renovated. The second exact pass comes with the retrograde in October 2026.
current.reading:
Your Sun at 1°49' Sagittarius sits in the 6th house alongside Mars and the North Node. What you do every day is an expression of your core identity and soul path. The 6th house isn't a neutral container for tasks; it's where your North Node lives. The daily work is what you're becoming.

Uranus is now in Gemini, the sign directly opposite your Sagittarius stellium, moving into opposition with your Sun. Oppositions create awareness through contrast: Uranus in Gemini (information, adaptability, multiplicity, the quick pivot) pressing against the Sun in Sagittarius (authenticity, direction, embodied knowing, the single true north).

The feeling is not crisis. It's a persistent, subtle friction around how you present your expertise, hold your professional identity, and show up in the rooms where your work gets evaluated. The framing that used to fit may start to feel slightly off from the inside. A way you've been describing yourself that no longer captures what you actually are. A professional container built for a previous version of the work. Not wrong, just outdated. Because Uranus transits never move in straight lines — its retrograde means three passes over the same degree — this renovation happens in waves.

current.summary: Neptune trine natal NNode peaked around May 2026 and is now 1.24° separating. The inspired path and the soul direction confirmed their alignment — the work that arrives rather than being forced is still the path.
current.reading:
Your natal North Node sits at 3°02' Sagittarius in the 6th house. Sagittarius points toward meaning-making, teaching, philosophical depth, the expansion that comes from genuine inquiry rather than surface coverage. In the 6th house, that growth direction happens through daily practice: not abstract seeking, but the daily doing of the thing that matters. The 6th house North Node says the path is the practice. Not the destination. The practice itself.

Neptune in Aries at approximately 4° forms a trine to the NNode at 3°02' Sagittarius. Both fire signs, the 120° angle of ease and natural current. Neptune brings dissolved rigidity, inspiration that arrives rather than being constructed, permeability between the imaginal and the real, the capacity to receive direction without forcing it into a pre-existing framework. A trine carries these qualities as support. The soul direction was being infused with inspiration rather than tested by structure.

What this looked like in practice: the intuitive leaps that felt both inspired and deeply correct. The work that arrived rather than being forced. The sense that the right direction was becoming clear not through planning but through recognition. Neptune trine NNode is the soul direction clarified through vision rather than through effort. Neptune in Aries adds a specific quality to that infusion: the inspiration is active and forward-launching, not still or contemplative.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini is applying toward sesquiquadrate to natal Neptune in the Capricorn 7th. Background friction between how things in the relational field are framed and what they actually are. Exact around July 2026.
current.reading:
Natal Neptune sits at approximately 19°11' Capricorn in the 7th house. Neptune in the 7th is the chart signature that close partnerships have always carried a quality of the intangible: an undercurrent of the transcendent or the imagined in 1:1 connection. The relational field is porous. Deeply inspired collaborative visions, but also the risk of seeing a partnership as something slightly more than it is. Capricorn grounds Neptune's dissolving tendency in real-world structure and ambition; the idealization here isn't airy, it's architectural. It builds toward something solid in the imagination and then has to reconcile that structure with reality.

Uranus is now at 2.83° Gemini. The sesquiquadrate (135°) to natal Neptune at 19.71° Capricorn is a minor friction aspect. Not the confrontational pressure of a square, not the acute disruption of an opposition. The sesquiquadrate is a persistent low-grade recalibration signal: two energies that keep pressing against each other in a way that doesn't resolve cleanly, but that accumulates toward an adjustment.

What Uranus in Gemini is pressing on natal Neptune in Capricorn 7th: the way language, framing, and new information (Gemini's register) interacts with the relational idealization and collaborative vision principles already wired into the 7th house. When Uranus moves through Gemini, it introduces sudden pivots in how things are named, described, and framed. When that Gemini electricity makes contact with natal Neptune's dreaming-and-dissolving function in the partnership house, the friction is about recalibrating how the relational field is described versus what it actually is.

current.summary: Neptune past exact inconjunct to natal Jupiter in the Scorpio 5th, now separating at 1.41°. The friction between Neptune's dissolving expansion and Scorpio Jupiter's total-depth creative engine pressed on where inspiration ends and construction begins.
current.reading:
Neptune in Aries at 4°16' is past exact inconjunct to natal Jupiter at 2°87' Scorpio in the 5th house. The 150° inconjunct is an adjustment aspect between incompatible registers: Neptune's dissolving, vision-expanding quality pressing against Jupiter in Scorpio's demand for full depth before commitment. The friction that ran between them was specific — the temptation to expand the creative scope before the core depth was fully complete, or to float the work in an atmosphere of possibility rather than committing it to form. That pressure has peaked and is now separating.

The residue of this transit is useful: a clearer boundary between where inspiration is genuinely showing you something and where it's creating atmospheric expansion without structure. Scorpio Jupiter knows the difference. Neptune's passing inconjunct helped sharpen the line.

This is a separating transit. Its active pressure phase has passed. What remains is the calibration it produced.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini approaching sesquiquadrate to natal Uranus in the Capricorn 7th. The disruptor is pressing friction into its own natal position — the relational field's built-in disruption wiring is receiving Gemini-register recalibration. Exact July 2026.
current.reading:
Natal Uranus sits at approximately 19°35' Capricorn in the 7th house. This is a generational placement — Uranus was in Capricorn from 1988 to 1996 — but in the 7th house, the generational becomes personal. Uranus here means partnerships have always carried disruption, independence, and unexpected structural shifts as native features. The 7th house is the domain of 1:1 relationship: lovers, collaborators, significant others, close working partners. Uranus there means those relationships have always had a quality of awakening in them — sudden, non-linear, not easily categorized. Conventional partnership structure doesn't fit well. The relational field is wired for something less predictable.

Transiting Uranus in Gemini forms a sesquiquadrate (135°) to this natal Uranus at 19°35' Capricorn. When a planet forms any aspect to its own natal position, the aspect is a self-aspect: not external pressure so much as the planet's current expression pressing against the pattern it established at birth. Uranus in Gemini (its current mode of disruption, running through the register of language, information, and multiplicity) is in friction with the Uranian pattern that was native to the chart at birth.

What this means practically: the way disruption, independence, and unexpected pivots have operated in the relational field is receiving new input from the Gemini register. Uranus in Gemini disrupts through information and framing — a sudden realization, a new piece of language that reframes something, a pivot in how a close relationship is described or understood. The sesquiquadrate between the two is a recalibration: the natal Capricorn pattern of relational disruption receiving Gemini-register input about how it communicates itself.

current.summary: The transiting NNode in Pisces has moved past exact semi-square to natal Neptune in the Capricorn 7th. A minor friction between the Piscean evolutionary direction and the relational field's existing idealization patterns. Brief and already separating.
current.reading:
The transiting North Node is at 2°40' Pisces, moving retrograde. It forms a semi-square (45°) to natal Neptune at ~19.71° Capricorn in the 7th house.

The semi-square is not a dramatic aspect. It's a 45° angle: a persistent, low-frequency friction between two chart points that are neither in natural flow nor in direct tension. The signal is more like a stone in a shoe than a closed door. Navigable, but impossible to ignore entirely once you notice it.

Your natal Neptune in Capricorn in the 7th is the chart signature of idealization in partnership and collaboration. Neptune here doesn't create casual relationships. It creates ones that carry a quality of vision or transcendence, for better or worse. When the transiting Piscean Node forms a semi-square to the natal Capricorn Neptune, it creates a minor friction between two dissolving forces. The signal: notice which Neptune-flavored relational dynamics are getting louder right now — the inspired ones and the idealized ones alike. This transit is already separating; the course-check has passed.

current.summary: Transiting Chiron at 29° Aries is applying toward inconjunct to natal Sun in the Sagittarius 6th. The wound's accumulated intelligence is pressing from an incompatible angle into the Sun's organizing function — a calibration signal about which version of the identity shows up to the work.
current.reading:
Transiting Chiron at 29°79' Aries is forming an inconjunct to natal Sun at 1°82' Sagittarius in the 6th house. The wound's accumulated intelligence — earned through every place the identity was tested, every moment the self-presentation met friction rather than recognition — is pressing from an incompatible angle into the Sun's organizing function.

Chiron in Aries carries the knowledge of the courage that shows up damaged and shows up anyway. The inconjunct to the Sagittarian 6th house Sun is a persistent signal about the relationship between the wound's knowledge and how the work identity presents itself. Not a crisis in the daily work. A calibration signal about which version of the Sun shows up to the practice: the one that has absorbed what the wound learned, or the one still performing around it.

This is at 2.03° applying — entering but not yet in the reading's headline. The contact builds through mid-summer as Chiron moves into deeper Aries territory.

current.summary: Uranus in Gemini is building toward sextile with natal Moon in the Aries 10th. The sextile is cooperative — Uranus's awakening is offering something to the career-emotional circuit rather than pressing against it. Still at 2.14°, building toward closer contact.
current.reading:
Uranus in Gemini is moving into sextile with natal Moon at 4°97' Aries in the 10th house. Not yet at the reading's active threshold, but building. The sextile is a cooperative aspect: Uranus's awakening, its sudden reconfiguration, is offering something to the 10th house Moon rather than pressing against it.

The Aries Moon's quick-fire emotional intelligence and the 10th house career-emotional circuit are receiving Gemini frequency: new information, a sudden reframe, the unexpected that opens rather than disrupts. When this contact tightens, it may show up as a clarity about professional direction that arrives sideways — from a conversation, a new frame, an unexpected piece of information — rather than from deliberate planning.

This builds toward closer orb as Uranus moves through early Gemini. Watch for this contact to become a reading headline as the orb narrows below 1°.

current.summary: Pluto retrograde in Aquarius is applying toward sextile to natal North Node in the Sagittarius 6th. The depth of understanding available through the work is being backed by the planet of irreversible transformation — a cooperative offer to the soul direction.
current.reading:
Pluto retrograde in Aquarius at 5°18' is forming a sextile to natal North Node at 3°02' Sagittarius in the 6th house. The NNode is the soul growth direction: Sagittarian meaning-making enacted through daily work, the craft that carries philosophical depth.

Pluto's sextile offers something structural and permanent to that direction: the depth of understanding available through the work, the capacity to see what others don't see because you've gone further in. Pluto cooperates with the NNode rather than challenging it. What the soul direction has chosen is being backed by the planet of irreversible transformation.

This is at 2.15° applying — entering the active range. As it tightens, the emphasis is on what the work reveals that can't be un-seen, and how that revelation becomes part of the daily practice.

current.summary: Pluto retrograde in Aquarius is applying toward square to natal Jupiter in the Scorpio 5th. Two fixed signs in 90° tension: Pluto pressing for irreversible restructuring, Jupiter demanding total depth engagement. At 2.32°, this is entering the active range.
current.reading:
Pluto retrograde at 5°18' Aquarius is applying toward a square with natal Jupiter at 2°87' Scorpio in the 5th house. Aquarius and Scorpio are both fixed signs: neither one yields. Pluto as the transiting planet brings pressure for irreversible restructuring. Jupiter in Scorpio in the 5th is the creative engine: the work that operates at total depth, the business that requires full imaginative weight.

A Pluto square to this Jupiter is not a minor contact. The square will press on what the creative work is fundamentally oriented toward: whether its current structures can hold what the depth has been building, and what needs to be released or restructured to make room for what Pluto is forcing to the surface. Fixed signs don't yield — but Pluto is patient. It applies pressure until something gives.

At 2.32° this is entering the reading's active range. Track as it tightens. The square between Pluto in Aquarius and Jupiter in Scorpio is the one that will most require looking directly at what the creative work is built for and whether that foundation still holds.

current.summary: Jupiter in Cancer past exact sesquiquadrate to natal Mars in the Sagittarius 6th. The expansion that Cancer Jupiter has been offering pressed on the drive layer in the daily work — a minor friction about pace and scope.
current.reading:
Jupiter in Cancer at 26°41' forms a sesquiquadrate to natal Mars at approximately 22° Sagittarius in the 6th house. Mars in Sagittarius in the 6th is the drive layer of the daily work: direct, forward-moving, identity-bound. Jupiter's Cancer expansion presses on that drive from a 135° angle — not confrontation, but a persistent recalibration about scope and pace.

Cancer Jupiter expands through emotional attunement, care, and building that feels safe rather than driven. The sesquiquadrate to natal Mars's Sagittarian directness creates a background signal about whether the pace of the daily work is sustainable and whether the emotional layer of the work is being attended to alongside the driving force.

This is separating — the peak has passed.

current.summary: Jupiter in Cancer past exact trine to natal Pluto in the Scorpio 6th. A water trine: Cancer's nurturing expansion offered something to Pluto's depth and transformation capacity in the daily work domain. Still in recent range.
current.reading:
Jupiter in Cancer at 26°41' forms a trine to natal Pluto at approximately 25° Scorpio in the 6th house. Both water signs, the 120° angle of ease and natural current. Jupiter's Cancer expansion and Pluto's Scorpio depth transformation are in cooperative flow.

Natal Pluto in Scorpio in the 6th is the depth-transformation engine of the daily work: the capacity to go all the way in, to research beyond the surface, to hold what's uncomfortable until it becomes insight. Jupiter's trine from Cancer offered an opening — expansion through emotional and intuitive attunement feeding into the depth-work capacity.

This is now separating at 1.02°. The cooperative window is passing. The ease of expansion through depth was available during this contact; what it opened remains.
